name: Rootis
key_features: Draconic Resilience (bonus HP, natural AC 13 + DEX)
Elemental Affinity (+3 damage to spells of draconic ancestry type, spend 1 SP for resistance 1 hour)
Dragon Wings (bonus action: fly speed = walking speed)
Draconic Presence (5 SP: 60-ft aura of fear/charm, WIS DC 17, 1 minute)
Sorcery Points (20, regain on long rest)
Metamagic: Distant Spell, Empowered Spell, Extended Spell, Twinned Spell
Font of Magic (convert spell slots to/from sorcery points)
defenses: Elemental Affinity resistance (chosen type, costs SP)
party_role_guess: Blaster / Utility Caster (Draconic Sorcerer, metamagic, flying, Staff of Power)
